name: tech-quiz Android Dev Container
initializeCommand: bash -lc 'if [ ! -f "$HOME/.gitconfig-shared" ]; then if [ -f "$HOME/.gitconfig" ]; then cp "$HOME/.gitconfig" "$HOME/.gitconfig-shared"; else touch "$HOME/.gitconfig-shared"; fi; fi; curl -fsSL https://gist.githubusercontent.com/DIO0550/9030208a4e92984e9a1369f61ca8605e/raw/initialize-command.sh | bash'
